script.name: !job.xenon.incursion
script.sourceplaintext:
[THIS] ->set homesector to [SECTOR]
* add needs equipment (ie Jumpdrive) $ship = [THIS] gosub sub.Setup
$followers = [THIS] -> get all formation followers if $followers $i = size of array $followers while $i dec $i = $ship = $followers[$i] gosub sub.Setup $ship ->set autojump active: [TRUE] end end
@ = wait 1000 ms
* idle for abit after creation while [THIS] -> exists $rnd = random value from 600 to 1800 - 1 @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.idle.timeout : timeout in sec=$rnd wait while docked=[FALSE]
@ = wait 100 ms
* find target for incursion $range = [THIS] -> get job jump range [THIS] ->set command: COMMAND_INVASION
$sectors = [THIS] -> find all sectors within $range jumps: Only known sectors=[FALSE]
$trade.rank = get trade rank title: text=[FALSE] $fight.rank = get fight rank title: text=[FALSE] $rank = ( ( $trade.rank + $fight.rank ) / 2 ) * 8 $rnd = random value from 0 to 900 - 1
* if player is idling, then start to target thier assets $player.idle = get player idle time if $player.idle > 7200 if is SETA active skip if random value from 0 to 3 - 1 $rnd = 0 else skip if random value from 0 to 5 - 1 $rnd = 0 end end
if $rank > $rnd $player.sectors = table alloc $i = size of array $sectors while $i dec $i = $sec = $sectors[$i] $stations = $sec ->get player owned station table from sector if $stations $key = get next key: table=$stations key=null while $key $next.key = get next key: table=$stations key=$key if $key -> is of class Headquarters remove key $key from table $stations else if $key -> is of type Xenon Hub remove key $key from table $stations end $key = $next.key end if size of table $stations $player.sectors[$sec] = $sec end end end
if $player.idle > 7200 $player.sec = [PLAYERSHIP] -> get sector $player.sectors[$player.sec] = $player.sec end
if size of table $player.sectors $sectors = get keys: table=$player.sectors end end
@ = wait 100 ms
$sec = null while size of array $sectors $sec = get random array item: array=$sectors $sec.owner = $sec -> get owner race if $sec.owner == Guilds $sec = null else break end end if $sec $pos = create new array, arguments=0, 0, 0, $sec, null
while [SECTOR] != $sec gosub sub.Setup @ = wait 100 ms @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.jumptogate.nearest : targetpos=$pos should followers jump too=[TRUE] @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.movetosector : sector=$sec end
$start.time = playing time $current.time = playing time while ( $start.time + 3600 ) > $current.time @ = wait 100 ms @ = [THIS] -> call script !fight.invasion : the sector to invade=$sec @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.idle.timeout : timeout in sec=300 wait while docked=[FALSE] $current.time = playing time end end
gosub sub.GoHome @ = wait 100 ms gosub sub.Idle [THIS] ->reset flight time @ = wait 100 ms end
return null
sub.GoHome: $homesector = [THIS] -> get homesector
while $homesector != [SECTOR] gosub sub.Setup @ = wait 100 ms @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.jump : gate or sector=$homesector followers should jump too=[TRUE] @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.movetosector : sector=$homesector end endsub
sub.Setup: = $ship -> add 1 units of Jumpdrive = $ship -> add 1 units of Navigation Command Software MK1 $energy = $ship ->get needed jump energy: jumps=30 $got.energy = $ship -> get amount of ware Energy Cells in cargo bay $energy = $energy - $got.energy do if $energy > 0 = $ship -> add $energy units of Energy Cells endsub
sub.Idle: @ $idle.time = [THIS] -> call script !lib.job.getidletime : [THIS] ->set command: COMMAND_IDLE @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.idle.timeout : timeout in sec=$idle.time wait while docked=[FALSE] endsub return null

comment.var: if player is idling, then start to target thier assets

line.text: get player owned station table from sector

sval.val: if player is idling, then start to target thier assets
